//: Vercel project config for the React + Vite frontend.
Backend is deployed separately on Render (see render.yaml at repo root).
After Render gives you the backend URL, set this on Vercel:
Frontend will then call that URL directly. Backend CORS already
When you connect this repo to Vercel pick:
Build Command:    pnpm install && pnpm build (auto-detected)
If you DON'T want to expose the backend URL to the browser, leave
VITE_API_URL unset and uncomment the rewrites block below — Vercel
will then proxy /api/* server-side. (Adds a Vercel edge hop.)
